author: fab_10
content: <@845691100072509460> I am trying you repo https://github.com/jihoonsong/local-devnet-focil, but when running `make run-registry` it does not work and the issue seems to be that Geth is not starting due to `Incorrect Usage: flag provided but not defined: -override.genesis` does it work for you?

author: jih2nn
content:
Hey! I'd recommend you to work with Besu only for now. Reth might be in a good shape but <@1122553751983628349> is the right person to ask its latest status.

Geth is outdated (it's on top of Osaka) and I don't think I can find some time to rebase it for the time being. I also think Geth team should take it over at some point as it's not experimental feature anymore.
